definitions.translation: to drink until it is empty

examples.no: de rakk akkurat å drikke opp kaffen før de måtte gå
examples.en: they had just enough time to finish their coffee before they had to leave

definitions.text: bruke alle pengene sine på alkoholholdig drikke
definitions.translation: to spend all one's money on alcoholic beverages

examples.no: hun drakk opp alle pengene sine
examples.en: she drank away all her money
